Document:
# Rule 10 – Erotic and Sexual Content is Forbidden. Erotic and sexual content is strictly prohibited in all forms and mediums. This includes any erotic roleplay (ERP) or comments involving descriptions, mentions, or enactments of sexual acts. This includes text, images, and any other form of content.
Basic safe-for-work interactions between characters such as hugging are allowed. Romantic relationships should not become the focus of the game for you or anyone else.
## Clarifications on Acceptable Language In-character insults are not considered erotic or sexual, as long as they do not become excessive or extreme.
Some examples of acceptable insults: - "Fuck you" - insult - "What a motherfucker" - insult - "How about you eat me instead" - Response to an unreasonable request.
It is best to avoid borderline content, ensuring roleplay remains appropriate within the established guidelines.
